title: Consolidated 7 doorway alternative pages into 1 canonical comparison hub
summary: Merged 7 near-identical templated alternative pages (aider, claude-code, conductor, continue, copilot, cursor, hermes) at 878-1264 words each into a single /compare page. The 7 old URLs now 301 redirect to /compare. Removed the 7 doorway ERBs, cleaned up controller and routes. Deployed to production via Capistrano. IndexNow notified for all 100 sitemap URLs.
why_this_repair: 0/80 GSC URLs indexed — domain-wide indexation suppression. Audit and execution board both identified the 7 templated alternative pages as the probable cause. Post-hold contract mandates distribution_architecture_repair when no truthful lane remains available.

modified: config/routes.rb (7 old paths → 301 redirects to /compare, add /compare route)
app/controllers/pages_controller.rb (remove 7 doorway actions, add compare action, update sitemap)

expected_outcome: Doorway-page cluster eliminated. Google should begin indexing non-doorway pages. Monitor GSC indexation count over the next 14 days. Target: >0 (any non-zero indexing is progress from current 0/80 state).
success_metric: >=1 URL indexed in GSC within 14 days
